name: pr_recombine
short_description: Re-establish a parent cell as a Reconfigurable Partition while removing a lower-level Reconfigurable Partition when using the Hierarchical Dynamic Function eXchange solution.
full_help:
pr_recombine

Description: 
Re-establish a parent cell as a Reconfigurable Partition while removing a lower-level Reconfigurable Partition when using the Hierarchical Dynamic Function eXchange solution.

Syntax: 
pr_recombine  [-cell <arg>] [-quiet] [-verbose]

Usage: 
  Name        Description
  -----------------------
  [-cell]     (Required) Specify reconfigurable container module name
  [-quiet]    Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]  Suspend message limits during command execution

Categories: 
FileIO

arguments.description: Suspend message limits during command execution
